title: Product Image Metadata Schema
description: Per-image metadata for diffusion LoRA fine-tuning on product photography

file_path.description: Relative path from project root, e.g. data/processed/img_001.jpg

caption.description: Full training caption. Format: '<trigger_word> <blip2_caption>'. Example: 'a photo of sks eyewear black rectangular frames on white background'

trigger_word.description: Rare token used as domain identifier

auto_caption.description: Raw BLIP-2 output before trigger word injection

quality_score.description: LAION aesthetic score or manual rating (0–1)

is_duplicate.description: Flagged true if near-duplicate detected; excluded from training

license.description: Usage rights — always record this for portfolio safety

notes.description: Manual annotation notes or known issues with this image

examples.caption: a photo of sks eyewear gold aviator sunglasses on white background, studio lighting, product shot
examples.auto_caption: gold aviator sunglasses on white background studio lighting product shot
